reviews.review_description: SO I WAS INVITED TO THIS GAME AND SOMEONE SAID A BAD LITTLE WORD AND I WAS CHECKING OUT THE TRAMPOLINE AND MAPS AND THEN I GOT REPORTED FOR NO REASON AT ALL AND THE NEXT DAY I GOT ON TO PLAY THE GAME AND IT SAID YOU ARE BANNED and I did nothing at all and I’m still banned from this day so stupid like L game do not get it it’s a waste of time 🤬

reviews.review_title: This is the best fan game for gorillatag
reviews.review_description: This is a amazing game love it almost as much as gorilla tag little laggy at times but not to bad
